productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Grey & Black Top
description: Style Note This grey and black top, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this fabulous top. Style this with your favourite jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. Product Details Grey and black top that has V-neck, short puffed sleeves, a pleated ruffle along the neckline and a zip in the middle of the ruffle Material and Care 100% polyester Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
